channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lucas Herbert's record-equalling round at British Open falls short as final putt eludes him
item.description: Australian golfer Lucas Herbert delivered a stunning performance at the British Open, carding an eight-under 62 to equal the record for the lowest opening nine holes at a men's major. The 30-year-old,...

item.title: Kochi Corporation to Redefine Biomedical Waste Subsidy with Direct Benefit Transfer
item.description: The Kochi Corporation plans to implement a direct benefit transfer system for subsidizing biomedical waste collection, aiming to ensure only eligible beneficiaries receive financial support. Currently...

item.title: Andy Burnham's Political Journey: From Manchester Mayor to Labour Leadership
item.description: Andy Burnham's political career has been marked by resilience and strategic reinvention. After losing his Labour leadership bid in 2016, he transitioned from Westminster to Greater Manchester, where h...

item.title: Wildfire near Mooseland Road forces evacuations as crews work to contain 300-hectare blaze
item.description: Firefighters are actively combating a wildfire near Mooseland Road on Nova Scotia’s Eastern Shore, approximately 100 kilometers east of Halifax. The blaze, estimated at 300 hectares, has prompted a ma...

item.title: Tanzania's Content Creators Urge Government to Combat Inflammatory Posts and Promote Positive Social Media Use
item.description: Online content creators in Mbeya have called on the Tanzanian government to strengthen enforcement against individuals spreading inflammatory content on social media, which they argue fuels misinforma...

item.title: Ugandan Women React to Surprise Meeting with President Museveni in Rural Area
item.description: A video of Ugandan women encountering President Yoweri Museveni on a rural road has gone viral, showcasing their dramatic reactions to the surprise meeting. The footage, shared by BTG News on Instagra...

item.title: ADC Crisis: Amaechi Backtracks After Being Nominated as Running Mate
item.description: The article details the legal battle between Amaechi and the ADC party over the 2023 presidential primary election. Amaechi, who was initially a candidate, alleged that the party violated electoral ru...

item.title: Industry urges stable liquor tax framework to balance revenue and public health concerns
item.description: The article discusses the National Treasury's virtual engagement with liquor stakeholders regarding proposed alcohol excise reforms. Industry representatives, including the Beer Association of SA and ...

item.title: Former Senate Sergeant-at-Arms Files Counter-Affidavit Against Obstruction of Justice Allegations
item.description: Former Senate Sergeant-at-Arms Mao Aplasca has submitted a counter-affidavit in response to obstruction of justice complaints filed against him by the opposition coalition Tindig Pilipinas and other g...

item.title: Cricket Legend Sir Garfield Sobers Passes Away at 89
item.description: Sir Garfield Sobers, widely regarded as the greatest all-rounder in cricket history, has passed away at the age of 89. The West Indies Cricket Board announced his death, marking the end of an era in t...

item.title: Senate Approves Thika Town's Promotion to Smart Industrial City Status
item.description: The Senate Standing Committee on Devolution has recommended that Thika Municipality be elevated to a Smart Industrial City status, marking a significant development for Kiambu County. The committee as...

item.title: Jackson Suber Surpasses Expectations with Strong Start at British Open
item.description: Jackson Suber, a 26-year-old golfer with no prior major championship experience, stunned the field by capturing the solo lead after a remarkable 5-under 65 in the first round of the British Open at Ro...

item.title: Rajasthan High Court upholds Asaram's life imprisonment for rape while acquitting him of gang rape and conspiracy charges
item.description: The Rajasthan High Court has upheld the life imprisonment awarded to self-styled godman Asaram in the 2013 rape case involving a minor girl, while acquitting him of the additional charges of gang rape...

item.title: Global oil prices surge amid escalating US-Iran tensions
item.description: Oil prices have surged globally as tensions between the United States and Iran escalate, with both nations engaging in targeted attacks across the Middle East. The conflict, which has intensified foll...

item.title: African Children Unite Through Chess Tournament

item.title: Chloe Fineman Leaves 'Saturday Night Live' After Seven Seasons
item.description: Comedian Chloe Fineman has announced her departure from 'Saturday Night Live' (SNL) after seven seasons. The news was shared via an Instagram post, where Fineman reflected on her time at the iconic sk...

item.title: Safety Tips for Motorcycle Taxi Riders to Avoid Road Crimes
item.description: A report on recent road crimes involving motorcycle taxi riders in Caloocan and Cavite highlights the need for heightened awareness. Criminologist Kier Gabriel Tampos, Phd., RCrim, emphasized that thi...

item.title: PM Shehbaz reaffirms security for Chinese nationals and signs $440m pharmaceutical deals with China
